x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: The WSD Workspace is the primary interface where Now Assist WSD AI insights are presented to managers and employees. Without it, AI-generated space recommendations and occupancy insights are produced but never surfaced where they are needed.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_wsd_core"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Workplace Core (" + gr.getValue("name") + ") is active", finding: "Workplace Core is active. Now Assist WSD AI insights including space recommendations and occupancy analysis are accessible to workplace managers and employees." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_wsd_workspace"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Workplace Service Delivery Workspace is active", finding: "WSD Workspace is active. Now Assist WSD AI insights are surfaced in context for workplace managers." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "WSD Workspace not found or inactive", finding: "WSD Workspace is not active. Now Assist WSD AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface." }; })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate the Workplace Service Delivery workspace via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. The workspace is required for Now Assist WSD AI insights to surface in context.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851cca
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[The WSD Workspace is the primary interface where Now Assist WSD AI insights are presented to managers and employees. Without it, AI-generated space recommendations and occupancy insights are produced but never surfaced where they are needed.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>WSD Workspace Activation</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_wsd_core"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Workplace Core (" + gr.getValue("name") + ") is active", finding: "Workplace Core is active. Now Assist WSD AI insights including space recommendations and occupancy analysis are accessible to workplace managers and employees." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_wsd_workspace"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Workplace Service Delivery Workspace is active", finding: "WSD Workspace is active. Now Assist WSD AI insights are surfaced in context for workplace managers." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "WSD Workspace not found or inactive", finding: "WSD Workspace is not active. Now Assist WSD AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface." }; })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>WSD</module> <number>CHK0006230</number> <order>800</order> <remediation_guidance>Activate the Workplace Service Delivery workspace via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. The workspace is required for Now Assist WSD AI insights to surface in context.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851cca</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
